description: Cross-impl conformance for the vat_ Attempt content-address. The Rust minter (crates/vela-protocol/src/attempt.rs, derive_id) and the Python re-verifier (conformance/verify_attempt_id.py) must derive identical ids from the same canonical body. The id preimage is the canonical JSON of the Attempt body with attempt_id, signature, and signer_pubkey_hex zeroed; vat_ + sha256(preimage)[:16]. Key-independent on purpose.
